name: Zubaba Buster
desc: If this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent, at the end of that Damage Step: Destroy the 1 face-up monster on the field that has the lowest ATK (your choice, if tied), and if you do, this card loses 800 ATK.
mnst_eff: If this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent, at the end of that Damage Step: Destroy the 1 face-up monster on the field that has the lowest ATK (your choice, if tied), and if you do, this card loses 800 ATK.
eff: If this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent, at the end of that Damage Step: Destroy the 1 face-up monster on the field that has the lowest ATK (your choice, if tied), and if you do, this card loses 800 ATK.

action: Activates if battle damage is inflicted
